name: Pumpkin Cheesecake Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter in a bowl until well combined.
3. Press the mixture into a pie dish and bake for 10 minutes.
4. Remove from oven and set aside.
5. In another bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth.
6. Stir in pumpkin pie filling, heavy cream, ginger, salt, nutmeg, clove, and black pepper until combined.
7. Pour the mixture over the crust in the prepared pie dish.
8. Sprinkle pecan halves on top of the filling.
9. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until set.
10. Allow to cool before serving with sweetened whipped cream.
